chinese_news.title: 中国游戏的错位竞争：头部赌3A，腰部吃存量 | 游戏风向标
chinese_news.summary:
文丨小葵

编辑丨果脯

中国游戏产业正站在一个微妙的分水岭上。

一边，腾讯网易等头部大厂利用资本，以全球资源整合或漫长自研周期，向代表行业塔尖的3A单机游戏发起冲锋；另一边，以4399百奥为代表的腰部力量，在各自深耕的细分赛道里，通过成熟玩法复刻与精细化运营，稳守利润阵地。

今年夏日游戏节的发布会上，数十家全球顶尖游戏厂商轮番登台，发布了超过50款新作的最新消息。

在海外大厂普遍打出“老IP重制+续作”保守牌局中，腾讯和网易同时拿出3A级的单机产品，并肩出现在全球顶级展会的聚光灯下。

当大厂渴望用3A讲述中国故事建立全球品牌壁垒，腰部厂商则在存量市场中持续收割，一个向上押注3A，一个向下蚕食存量。这两条看似背道而驰的路，正共用着同一个起点。

01

本次SGF上，腾讯拿出《穿越火线：潜伏》与《古剑》堪称两张风格迥异的牌。

《穿越火线：潜伏》由That's No Moon工作室（核心成员来自顽皮狗、Infinity War

chinese_news.title: 12306要忙着赚钱了
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 王晗玉

编辑 | 张帆

近日，市场监管总局联合中央网信办、国家铁路局，依法约谈携程、同程、去哪儿、飞猪、美团、智行火车票、高铁管家7家旅游出行第三方平台，直指平台在火车票销售领域存在多项不规范经营行为。

具体来看，违规行为包括不当宣传“候补帮抢”及付费选座、不当诱导用户“买长乘短”“买短乘长”，不当收集、使用用户个人信息等问题。后续监管部门将加大监管执法力度。

此次集中约谈，不仅直指OTA平台火车票业务的乱象根源，也揭开了在线旅游行业围绕出行流量展开的深层博弈。

监管收紧的背景下，传统OTA依赖的流量逻辑正在动摇，而铁路官方平台跨界拓展酒旅业务的可能性，也让整个在线出行行业迎来新一轮变数。

抢票“加速包”，OTA的“流量加速包”

每逢各大、小长假，打开OTA平台的火车票页面，“极速抢票”“候补加速”“高成功率帮抢”等标语便铺天盖地，甚至

chinese_news.title: 北大科学家下场做脑机接口，种子轮融了近亿元
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 孙小雯

访谈 / 编辑 | 海若镜

「暗涌Waves」独家获悉，侵入式脑机接口公司「芯生视界」近日完成近亿元人民币种子轮融资。本轮融资由经纬创投领投，星连资本、燕缘创投、水木创投跟投。

当下，侵入式脑机接口已经在治疗瘫痪、脑控外设等医疗场景落地，验证长期植入的安全、有效。与此同时，AI Agent和具身智能技术加速进化，也放大了市场对脑机接口的期待：改写未来“人机交互”的方式，实现人机融合、增强人类。马斯克和他的Neuralink，正是这一叙事的风向标。

芯生视界团队集合了多位国家“脑计划”脑机接口方向“青年首席”：创始人王茜来自北京大学心理与认知科学学院、IDG麦戈文脑科学研究所。联合创始人李远宁来自上海科技大学，是卡耐基梅隆大学人工智能和神经科学博士，曾在加州大学旧金山分校Edward Chang实验室（脑机接口顶级实验室）从事博后研究多年。联创团队还包括来自北京大学具身智能、脑机芯片和类脑芯片等方向的专家。

chinese_news.title: 红杉、阿里押注过的具身大脑公司再融资，上交等投资数亿元｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，具身智能企业穹彻智能（Noematrix）近日完成新一轮数亿元融资，本轮融资由无锡数据集团领投，投资方包括上海交通大学AI未来基金（创业基金）、上海创之智科技有限公司（上海创智学院全资子公司）、一村资本等。 

这也是公司近半年来完成的又一轮融资。此前穹彻智能已获得多家机构加持，包括Prosperity7 Ventures、红杉中国、C Capital、阿里巴巴和Sea Limited等。

穹彻智能是硬氪长期关注的企业。公司成立于2023年11月，长期专注具身智能基础模型与系统的自主研发，已发布有核心产品“穹彻具身大脑”（Noematrix Brain），并围绕其构建了覆盖数据采集、模型训练到部署验证、具身机器人应用全流程的软硬件产品体系。

具身智能的行业叙事正在经历一次静默的转向。过去两年，赛道内备受追捧的能力是“完成一个动作”，抓取、搬运、行走等任务在实验室或演示台上被反复验证。但自今年以来，一个新的衡量尺度正在浮现：机器人能否在真实物理环境中

chinese_news.title: 36氪「2026最具价值成长企业100」正式发布
chinese_news.summary:
时代从不被旁观者定义，它只发生在那些正在成长的人身上。

今天，当人们讨论华为、字节跳动、大疆、Tesla或OpenAI时，很容易忽略这样一个事实：在成为行业领导者之前，它们都曾是一家成长中的创业公司。

在初期，没有天然的市场地位，没有成熟的商业体系，也未必被所有人看好。但通过持续的技术突破和产品迭代，它们一步步从“挑战者”变成了“定义者”。

商业史本质上是一部成长史。那些最终改

chinese_news.title: 中科院博士冲上市，市值超105亿港币
chinese_news.summary:
本文约1900字，建议阅读4分钟

作者 | 彭孝秋

6月17日，中科闻歌（01956.HK）正式启动招股，发行价60.70港元，每手200股，市值105.07亿港元。此次IPO全球发售约1483.46万股，募资总额约9亿港元，预计6月26日在港交所主板挂牌。

上市后，中科闻歌将成为"通用决策大模型第一股"。在中国企业级大模型市场里，中科闻歌排第八，份额2.2%。这是一家由中国科学院自动化研究所科学家创办的公司，过去三年累计亏掉约5.83亿元（净亏损口径）。

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Bond market signals (CoinDesk headline) suggest rate-cut narrative dying; Fed's Kevin Warsh maintaining hawkish hold; BTC slid after Fed meeting despite Iran peace deal equity lift, signaling macro headwinds.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (bond market signals on rates, BTC/ETF flows), CNBC (Warsh Fed meeting takeaways)

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Intel's 9% rally on Apple-Trump chip partnership news creates near-term competitive narrative; NVDA still dominance play but shifting geopolitical and domestic chip strategy could pressure valuations.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the S&P 500 decline >5% from today through 2026-07-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Fed hawkish hold (Warsh), oil falling (geopolitical tension relief), but macro cross-currents (rate expectations, earnings cycle) create two-way risk; equity rally from Iran deal may stall.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Warsh Fed meeting, oil/Hormuz reopening, equity performance)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX successfully conduct an uncrewed Starship orbital refueling test by 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX shares dropped 5% after three-day rally lost steam; IPO expectations high but execution risk on core tech roadmap; orbital refueling is critical near-term milestone.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (SpaceX share momentum volatility, Gwynne Shotwell profile on IPO trajectory)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates at least once by 2026-08-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Kevin Warsh's first Fed meeting followed script closely with no rate cut; bond market flashing dovish signals despite hawkish hold; market now pricing in delayed cuts vs. earlier expectations.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Warsh Fed takeaways, bond market signals via CoinDesk)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Anthropic announce a public product launch or partnership with a Fortune 500 company by 2026-09-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Anthropic official press release, SEC filings, or verified TechCrunch/CoinDesk announcement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Anthropic CEO's G7 appearance on AI coalition calls suggests elevated policy/corporate engagement; market underprices enterprise AI partnership velocity vs. OpenAI-Microsoft momentum.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Anthropic + DeepMind CEOs at G7 on AI standards), no public follow-up partnerships announced yet

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Strait of Hormuz shipping volumes return to pre-deal baseline within 60 days of Iran-U.S. memorandum execution (by 2026-07-04)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Energy Information Administration weekly petroleum data, CIMB shipping indices, or Lloyd's List port throughput reports
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: IEA forecasts 2027 supply glut; market pricing in immediate Hormuz relief, but CNBC/BBC reporting warns backlogs and security checks will delay normalization; shipping insiders expect 8-12 week lag.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (IEA supply glut forecast), BBC (Hormuz reopening timeline uncertainty)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Intel stock close above its 2026-05-05 level on 2026-12-31 (post-Apple partnership announcement)?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Intel surged 9% on Trump-Apple-U.S. chip design news; market euphoria often fades when partnership details reveal execution/capex burdens; semiconductor cycle headwinds remain.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Intel 9% rally on Apple partnership), no details on capex or revenue timeline disclosed

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's realized price fall below its 200-week moving average by 2026-09-15?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Glassnode Realize Price (200W SMA) or CryptoQuant verified data feed
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Kraken report: buying BTC below 200W MA historically delivers >100% median returns; current consolidation amid Fed hawkishness creates asymmetric entry; low vol. environment underprices tail upside.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Kraken analysis), BTC slide post-Fed meeting

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Anthropic or Google DeepMind secure binding U.S. government AI standards commitments by 2026-11-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: White House official statement, Federal Register notices, or verified press from Anthropic/Google
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: G7 coalition framing suggests policy momentum, but U.S. bureaucracy moves slowly; market conflates summit visibility with regulatory capture; no binding framework typically emerges <6 months.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (G7 AI coalition meeting, Trump attendance)

investment_theses.thesis: USD strength and real rate persistence (DXY >107, 10Y real >1.8%) will pressure BTC and ETH into Q3 2026, creating tactical short positioning despite long-term on-chain demand.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Bond market flashing clear signals; Bitcoin/Ether ETF outflows ($111M combined) after Warsh Fed hold
CNBC: Warsh followed 'script closely' on rates, no dovish pivot; rate-cut hopes died
CoinDesk: Oil slide pressures inflation expectations but hawkish Fed stance dominates asset allocation
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran deal de-escalation and supply glut forecasts could trigger risk-on rotation faster than Fed hiking cycle; crypto volatility dislocations may create flash-crash buying opportunities before rate cuts materialize.
investment_theses.expression: Short BTC perps (25-50% of position) or sell 3-month BTC call spreads; hedge with long DXY ETF (UUP) or short duration Treasuries (PST) as macro hedge.

investment_theses.thesis: Semiconductor capex cycle will disappoint post-Intel rally as geopolitical chip de-risking diverts CapEx toward less efficient domestic fabs; NVDA and foundry exposure outperforms legacy chipmakers into 2026-Q4.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Intel surges 9% on Trump-Apple partnership, but partnership details (capex, timeline) remain undisclosed

36Kr (FLAG: Chinese media lead): China gaming and AI inference demand shifting to local Qwen/DeepSeek models; implies reduced NVDA H100/H200 orders from China, supporting U.S. domestic chip subsidy narrative
investment_theses.counter_view: Apple-Intel partnership could unlock high-margin custom silicon revenue stream, justifying Intel's recent rally; Taiwan geopolitical risk premium may drive TSMC/NVDA outperformance regardless of U.S. subsidy efficiency.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA relative to SMH (semiconductor ETF); overweight Taiwan-linked names (TSM ADR, TYAN) vs. Intel (INTC) or AMD (AMD).

investment_theses.thesis: Oil consolidation (down on IEA glut forecast, Iran deal) will maintain sub-$80/barrel into 2026-Q3, supporting consumer energy spending and reducing Fed rate-hike urgency; risk-off narratives overweight geopolitical tail risk.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Oil falls as IEA forecasts 2027 supply glut post-U.S.-Iran deal
BBC: Strait of Hormuz reopening, but backlogs/security delays will slow normalization
36Kr: China crude offtake demand remains stable despite slowdown; Iran redevelopment ($300B) unlikely to drive pricing before 2027
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical escalation in Niger/Levant or OPEC production cuts could trigger sharp oil rallies; U.S. shale growth constraints may tighten supply faster than IEA models account for.
investment_theses.expression: Short crude oil (WTI) or USO calls; long XLE (energy ETF) for relative stability vs. oil volatility; consider commodity futures curve (near-term contango) as hedge.

investment_theses.thesis: Prediction market regulatory pressure (Kentucky suit vs. Kalshi/Polymarket; CME suing CFTC over perpetual futures) will create 6-12 month headwind for betting volumes; Manifold and offshore Polymarket may see client migration.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Kentucky sues Polymarket, Kalshi, Coinbase, Robinhood, Webull over sports contracts
CoinDesk: CME chief says company plans to sue CFTC after perpetual futures approval (regulatory arbitrage war heating up)
investment_theses.counter_view: Prediction market adoption accelerating among institutional traders; regulatory clarity (even restrictive) could legitimize markets and increase volumes; betting culture deeply rooted in U.S. political cycles (2026 midterms, 2028 election).
investment_theses.expression: Avoid direct prediction market platform trades; if bullish on regulation-resistant models, track Manifold DAO governance token (if tradeable) or observe Polymarket user exodus metrics; short near-term volumes in litigation-exposed U.S. sportsbooks.

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese AI inference models (DeepSeek, Qwen) gaining enterprise adoption will disrupt NVDA GPU pricing power for inference workloads by 2026-Q4; U.S. AI capex concentration (data centers, training) will shift toward inference-optimized chips and software.
supporting_signals: Hacker News (Lore, DeepSeek Vision, Qwen discussions): Open-source AI inference tooling maturing; DeepSeek not blacklisted by U.S. (>100 firms blacklisted, but DeepSeek held off), signaling diplomatic AI trade-off
36Kr: Chinese gaming companies deploying local LLMs (Qwen inference) rather than closed APIs; enterprise shift to cost-efficient local models underway
CoinDesk/CoinTelegraph: Block's Builderbot (AI coding) handles 15% of code work; inference, not training, is differentiation bottleneck
investment_theses.counter_view: NVDA's software moat (CUDA, ecosystem lock-in) and data center relationships remain dominant; U.S. export controls will persist; geopolitical risk premium justifies NVDA premium valuations despite margin pressure.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU (Micron, memory/inference optimized) relative to NVDA; consider semiconductor subsector rotation (SMH vs. XLC for AI infrastructure); tactical short NVDA calls (6-month, 10-15% OTM) to monetize inference disruption narrative.
